summary: This cluster focuses on the taxonomic identification and phylogenetic characterization of a newly discovered red algal species from Korea. Researchers established *Griffithsia okiensis* as a distinct species through detailed morphological analysis of its thallic dimensions and cell ratios, combined with genetic sequencing of the psbA and rbcL markers. The work delineates its evolutionary relationship to *Griffithsia japonica* and documents its specific geographic distribution within Korean waters.
